function.rulebook_notes: Completed required bootstrap (tree /, read /AGENTS.MD, context), inspected 99_system/, and read nested AGENTS.MD files before using 10_entities/cast/ and 40_projects/. Used canonical entity and project README files only.
function.outcome_justification: 10_entities/cast/foundry.md identifies Foundry as the loud lab server. The canonical project records 40_projects/2026_05_02_black_library_evenings/README.MD, 40_projects/2026_04_02_hearthline/README.MD, 40_projects/2026_04_30_helios_workflow_sprint/README.MD, 40_projects/2026_04_02_house_mesh/README.MD, and 40_projects/2026_04_02_northstar_ledger/README.MD each list entity.foundry in linked_entities, establishing the projects in which the noisy server is involved.
